title: Marbella Luxury Yacht Charter: Costs, Boats and Tips for 2026
html:
For a luxury yacht charter in Marbella, depart from Puerto José Banús with a crewed motor yacht from around €800 per half day. BoatHire24 connects you to trusted local operators for a seamless booking experience.

Where to set off in Marbella

Marbella offers several distinguished marinas. Puerto José Banús is the most famous, with designer boutiques and fine dining steps from the pontoons. Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, in the town centre, is ideal for day trips to Cabopino beach. Further east, Cabopino Marina provides a quieter launch point for exploring the Artola Dunes. A short hop south, the chic enclave of Puerto Sotogrande offers long-term berths and luxury amenities. Each departure point grants quick access to the Costa del Sol's sheltered coves and open water.

Which boat to rent

  1. Axopar 37 best for coastal cruising and water sports, up to 12 guests, from €500 half-day.
  2. Azimut 60 ideal for stylish day charters with family, up to 10 guests, from €1,200 half-day.
  3. Lagoon 46 catamaran perfect for stable, spacious sailing, up to 12 guests, from €900 half-day.
  4. Fairline 65 Squadron suited for overnight luxury trips to Gibraltar, up to 8 guests, from €2,500 full day.
  5. Prestige 500 motor yacht a balance of performance and comfort, up to 8 guests, from €800 half-day; browse the Prestige 500 listing for availability.

How much does it cost to rent a luxury yacht in Marbella?

Prices for yacht charter Marbella range from €500 for a half-day on a premium motorboat to over €5,000 for a fully crewed superyacht. Shared tours of the coast cost as little as €80 per person. A small motorboat (up to 8 guests) for four hours is around €600. A catamaran for a full day (10, 12 guests) typically runs €1,200 to €2,000. Crewed motor yachts with captain and stewardess start at €2,500 for eight hours. All prices vary by season and vessel. Review yacht charter Marbella listings for up-to-date rates.

  • Shared tour: from €80 per person for 2, 3 hours.
  • Small motorboat half-day: from €500 for up to 8 guests.
  • Catamaran full day: from €1,200 for up to 12 guests.
  • Crewed yacht full day: from €2,500 for up to 12 guests.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

In Spain you generally need a recreational licence for boats over 6 metres, but many rental operators include a skipper so no licence is required. For bareboat charters, the operator will confirm exact licence requirements based on your nationality and the boat's power. Always verify with the host before booking.

High season runs June through September, when the Poniente wind often picks up in the afternoons, book a morning slot for calmer seas.

At a glance

  • Price band: €500, €5,000+ per half/full day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 2 hours to 8 hours (plus overnight)
  • Guest capacity: 6, 12 passengers typical
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can you take a yacht from Marbella to Gibraltar or Africa?

A crewed luxury yacht can reach Gibraltar (about 35 nautical miles) in under three hours, but crossing to Africa requires longer planning and a suitable vessel.

What is the best time of year for a luxury yacht charter in Marbella?

June to September offers the warmest weather and calmest seas, though May and October can still provide excellent conditions with fewer crowds.

Is it possible to rent a yacht in Marbella with a captain?

Most luxury charter listings on BoatHire24 include a professional skipper and crew as standard, ensuring a stress-free experience.
